contract.grounding: automatic — the wrapper precomputes the change set
contract.receipt: side effect — one receipt line per successful review

contract.grounding: automatic — the root AGENTS.md rides in context

modeCatalog.purpose: Run a bounded plan in a sandboxed workspace and return a diff.
whenToUse: a bounded sub-task whose acceptance criteria are already pinned
whenNotTo: work whose design is still open — decide it first

operands.description: the plan file to execute, or - to read it from stdin
extra backend flags, guarded by the passthrough policy

guardrails.value: runs under its own OS sandbox (workspace-write)

modeCatalog.purpose: Continue the most recent execute session with a follow-up instruction.
whenToUse: a small delta on work the backend already holds in context

operands.description: the follow-up instruction file, or - for stdin

modeCatalog.purpose: Critique an implementation plan before any code exists.
whenToUse: a plan draft heading into its review council
whenNotTo: a working-tree change set — that is review.code

guardrails.value: read-only — the backend cannot edit, create or delete a file
a successful review appends one receipt line
guardrails.condition: the receipt file is writable — a write failure warns, never fails the review

modeCatalog.purpose: Review the uncommitted working-tree change set.
whenToUse: a finished segment heading into its review round

operands.description: extra focus words appended to the review directive

modeCatalog.purpose: Send a round-2 delta into the review already in this conversation.
whenToUse: asking the same reviewer whether a fold really solves its own finding

operands.description: what this round must look at

modeCatalog.purpose: Send a raw advisory prompt and print the reply.
whenToUse: a throwaway probe of the CLI itself

operands.description: the prompt text, an @file, or - for stdin

modeCatalog.purpose: Relax the quality guards for a throwaway probe run.
whenToUse: a probe whose result cannot depend on model or effort
whenNotTo: any run whose output informs what ships

guardrails.value: a probe review mints a probe-marked receipt the state gate rejects
